title: BFA Illustration Senior Show
description: Celebrate the work of 31 graduating illustrators as they launch their professional careers. CCA’s Illustration program prides itself on having no ‘house style’—these collections are as individual as the students who made them. Each piece is handcrafted, conceptually rich, and made with care. Expect editorial, books, game arts and visual development, comics, posters, conceptual objects, wallpaper, and fabric design.

image.alt: BFA Illustration Senior Show poster featuring artwork by Ailin Wong, Spring 2026
